## NearWork ${{ github.ref_name }}

Final release of **NearWork**, a map-based Android job discovery application developed as a Final Year Project.

### Highlights

- Map-based nearby job discovery
- Smart job filtering
- Resume matching with compatibility scoring
- Real-time recruiter messaging
- Google Sign-In authentication

### Improvements

- Performance and stability enhancements
- Improved location accuracy
- UI refinements and bug fixes

### Installation

1. Download **nearwork-${{ github.ref_name }}.apk**
2. Enable **Install from Unknown Sources** if prompted.
3. Install the APK and sign in with your Google account.

> Requires Android 6.0 or later.
